purpose: M54 native octagram-compatible grammar support oracle fixtures
notes: Fixtures store oracle output bytes and provenance only.
Full third-party .gram model files are referenced by URL, commit/release, byte size, and SHA256, but are not checked in.
The synthetic rear-boundary fixture stores only Yune-owned tiny .gram bytes used to make an executable empty-context parity check.
Both lanes force translator/contextual_suggestions=false; contextual translation remains out of M54 scope.
The public librime C API and dynamic C++ plugin ABI are not part of these fixtures.
